what I offer

AI builds, automations & consulting

From building multi-project dashboards to full AI agents — real work for real problems.

most popular

Workflow Automation

Connect your tools and eliminate manual work. CRM updates, email triggers, invoice flows — fully automated using n8n, Make, or Zapier.

  • Multi-step workflow design
  • CRM & email automation
  • CSV / Google Sheets sync
  • Full documentation
AI agents

Custom AI Agents

Autonomous agents that qualify leads, handle support, and run tasks without human input. Built with Python and the latest AI APIs.

  • Lead qualification agent
  • Support & FAQ bot
  • Research & reporting agent
  • Multi-agent orchestration
dashboards

Data Dashboards

Multi-project ticket dashboards, SLA tracking, visual insights — built with Python, Streamlit, and Pandas. Drop a CSV and it works.

  • Multi-project support
  • SLA breach alerts
  • CSV & Excel ingestion
  • Dark-themed UI
websites

AI-Powered Websites

Fast, conversion-focused websites with embedded AI chatbots, smart lead capture forms, and booking systems built in.

  • Custom design & copy
  • Embedded AI chatbot
  • Booking & contact system
  • Mobile-first
1-on-1 sessions

Book a consultation

Whether you're a student curious about AI, a startup wanting to automate, or someone building their first project — let's talk. All sessions online via Google Meet.

₹299
30 minutes
Quick clarity call

Got one specific question? Career advice, tool recommendation, or a quick concept explained.

₹499
1 hour
Deep dive session

Walk through a topic together. AI fundamentals, how to start automating, career roadmap, or project review.

₹699
1.5 hours
Full mentorship

Extended session for deep-dive learning, hands-on building together, or full career planning with action steps.

schedule a session

Pick a time that works

Choose your session type above, then pick a date and available slot. All sessions run Mon–Sun, 3 PM – 10 PM IST.

  • Google Meet link sent instantly
  • Confirmation email to you
  • Pay via UPI before the session
  • Rescheduling with 24hr notice
Available time slots — Indian Standard Time (IST)

my work

Things I've built

Real projects solving real problems — mostly Python, AI, and automation.

dashboard · python

Multi-project ticket dashboard

Streamlit dashboard tracking tickets across PMP, Atlas, and eBooks projects — CSV drop-in, SLA tracking, per-project metrics, dark-themed charts.

view on github →
automation · workflow

AI workflow automations

Built end-to-end automations using n8n and Make — lead routing, CRM updates, email sequences, and Google Sheets sync for small teams.

get in touch →
ai agent · python

Custom AI agents

Autonomous agents for lead qualification, support ticket triage, and research — built with Python and Claude/OpenAI APIs.

discuss a project →
website · flask

This website

Built with Flask + Google Calendar API + Gmail SMTP. Real-time slot availability, automatic booking confirmation, and email alerts.

see github →
background

The person behind the builds

From cabin crew to AI builder — here's the journey.

2016

Cabin crew

Worked as cabin crew — passenger safety, service, and high-pressure customer interactions.

2018

Cabin crew instructor

Trained new recruits on grooming, safety, and interview preparation.

2019

Freelance video editor

Started creating content — reels, shorts, cashcow channels, and corporate edits.

2023

Technical support engineer

L1/L2 support, ticket management, customer communication, and now — building AI tools.

2025

AI builder & consultant

Building automations, dashboards, and AI agents. Teaching what I learn along the way.

What I work with:

Python Flask Streamlit AI agents Claude API n8n Make Zapier Google APIs Pandas SQL basics AWS basics Customer service Training & coaching Video editing Content creation

Availability

Consultation sessions: Mon–Sun, 3 PM – 10 PM IST

Project work: currently accepting new clients
